response.justification: The candidate fails to meet two critical mandatory requirements for this role. C++ experience is severely deficient—only ~6 months documented from 2014-2015, far short of the required 5-10 years—and they lack any domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or financial services. Their background is predominantly web, mobile, and open-source development, fundamentally misaligned with capital markets systems.
strengths: Senior-level engineer with demonstrated leadership and mentoring across multiple roles
Strong communication and teaching skills evidenced by workshops, conference talks, and technical education
Solid DevOps and CI/CD pipeline experience with Docker, GitLab, and infrastructure automation
concerns: Minimal C++ experience (~6 months in 2014-2015); mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development not demonstrated
Zero experience in capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or financial services domain
Weak relational database expertise; primarily MongoDB background with no SQL Server or Oracle experience mentioned
